sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sin lailung a mawl manin maw,
Ton le aih, galthat sa manin,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Nun bang nuam aw, ih gam lei-ah
Namcin Zeisu naubang ih pom ciang,
Lungdeih teng liibang cing ding a,
Zo laukha hong paallun ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tun le zua, lia leh taangte aw,
Singdang gam a eng dingin ah,
Tung Sianmang in lung awilo ee,
Gual tawh kim ding Sian siam hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A paallun tui bang luangluang ding,
Gual tung tuang vabang pil ding.
